prompt: A clean, minimal, modern 2D triple letter bonus tile sprite for a mobile word puzzle game. Labeled exactly with the text 'TL' in uppercase. Perfect square format. Rounded square tile shape with a neutral white-to-light-gray color base (completely grayscaled/white so it can be tinted in Unity UI). Crisp, bold, highly readable, perfectly centered dark gray sans-serif text 'TL'. Simple elegant typography. Polished minimal satin-like surface with a subtle elegant soft drop shadow underneath. Clean flat vector style, centered composition, transparent background.
